_comment: Git-tracked device map for the RA Hermes ecosystem. SELECTION uses the LIVE hostname
(a git-untracked runtime signal) so each physical machine resolves correctly without
per-machine setup. Override with the RA_DEVICE env var. Any URL can be overridden by
the matching env var (HONCHO_URL/GX10_URL/POSTGRES_URL/OPENPROJECT_URL/N8N_URL) per the
[IF] pattern; the env value always wins over the value below.
CONFIRMED (2026-06-05 on T3610): honcho :8000 (api up after alembic migration; embedding dim 1536 needs 4096 fix — see issue #3), pgvector :5433, redis :6379.

CONFIRMED (2026-06-05): inference endpoint http://192.168.100.1:11434/v1 responds; models qwen3.6:latest (chat) + qwen3-embedding:latest (4096-dim). raspi5p=192.168.100.50 (hostname raspberrypi), n8n :5678 reachable over 2.5G; OpenProject :8085 localhost-only on raspi5p (external: plm.abyz-lab.work via Cloudflare).

CONFIRMED (2026-06-05 on GX10): hostname gx10-d74b, 2.5G enx00e04c4728ca=192.168.100.1/24. Ollama :11434 running. Docker: open-webui :8080, searxng :8888. Models as of 2026-06-05: gpt-oss:120b (chat, OpenAI-compat alias for Qwen3-120B), qwen3-embedding:latest (embed, 4096-dim). Prior model qwen3.6:latest has been replaced by gpt-oss:120b. GX10_CHAT_MODEL override env var recommended; verify at runtime with GX10_URL/v1/models per REQ-TOOL-205.

t3610.description: Honcho server (FastAPI + pgvector + Redis) + RA experts. hostname: abyz-lab-Precision-T3610, 2.5G IP: 192.168.100.200

gx10.description: Grace Blackwell ARM, Qwen3 inference backend (OpenAI-compatible). hostname: gx10-d74b, 2.5G enx00e04c4728ca=192.168.100.1

rpi.description: Raspberry Pi 5+: OpenProject + n8n. hostname: raspberrypi, 2.5G eth1=192.168.100.50. OpenProject external: plm.abyz-lab.work (Cloudflare tunnel).

unknown.description: Unrecognized host (dev laptop etc). Assumes remote services over 2.5G LAN; treat destructive ops as UNSAFE until confirmed. OpenProject: use plm.abyz-lab.work (Cloudflare, LAN not reachable).
